economic_notes: First Nation operates Pelly Haylands Holdings Corp (agricultural/land). Purchased 20 bison (3 bulls, 7 cows, 10 calves) valued at $53,150. Has 14.28% interest in PHC Holdings Limited Partnership. Pursuing 1909 Surrender Claim and Key Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada with $2,172,923 in costs incurred to date. Six housing units under construction (CMHC Phase 16, total cost $1,019,480) and Phase 17 assets under construction ($327,324). Member of Yorkton Tribal Council.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Auditor's report dated February 12, 2025 - very delayed. Emphasis of matter paragraph regarding contingent assets (1909 Surrender Claim and Key Treaty Benefits Claim against Canada). Subsequent to year end, insurance on claim loans was cancelled and legal counsel changed. Consolidated entities include Key First Nation Pelly Haylands Holdings Corp. and Key First Nation Band Land Holdings Corp. with non-coterminous December 31 year ends. Key First Nation Pelly Hayland Trust is NOT consolidated as it is controlled by Trustees. Total government transfers calculated as ISC/FNIHB $4,807,273 + CMHC $206,447 = $5,013,720. Restricted cash includes current ($2,146,580) and long-term ($110,155) portions totaling $2,256,735. 'Other' expenses segment includes $1,081,790. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only ($328,388); capital lease repayments were $61,801 additional.
